Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
In this training, Dean is going to walk you through discovering your superpower. Some people call it “unique ability”, some people call it your “core
competencies”, but regardless of the terminology, by the end of this video you will be able to extract your superpower, unveil your unconscious
competencies and truly understand what makes you unique, special and someone people are willing to pay to learn from.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
List 3 things that make you stand out from your competition.
List 3 specific skills you have discovered that make you successful in what you do.
List 2 things that you do in your business that make you the happiest and are things you would never outsource because you do them the
best.
Write down 2‐3 stories that were turning points in your life. What experiences, rough times, epiphanies lead you to be the success you are
today?
Fully understand your superpower.
